infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Neha & Naveen Wedding App to access your photos to share memories.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Neha & Naveen Wedding App to use your camera to capture memories.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Allow Neha & Naveen Wedding App to save photos.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Allow Neha & Naveen Wedding App to send you wedding updates and reminders.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Neha & Naveen Wedding App to access your photos.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Neha & Naveen Wedding App to use your camera.
